sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106688" key="u(me/ninos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμέν-ῐνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὑμήν</etym>) <sense id="n106688.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of skin</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">membrane,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">περιγλωττίς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
